description: 200ms debounced vault.export() triggers full denormalization per edit. Every vault mutation: 200ms debounce then vault.export() (full recursive tree walk, clone every entity, reconstruct nested tree) then root prop update cascading re-renders across all mounted views. Auto-save compounds with second full denormalization + JSON + Blob + IDB write.
resolution: Replace full denormalization with incremental/partial export. Use granular subscriptions per view instead of single root prop. Separate auto-save from render path.

name: root prop cascades re-renders across all views
description: App.svelte maintains root variable (denormalized vault state) passed as prop to ArchiveView, BoardView, MetadataView, MapView, TimelineView, and all dialogs. Any vault mutation triggers root change then Svelte reactive update across entire component tree. All views re-render even when mutation affects one entity in one view.

name: 9 effect blocks in App.svelte with overlapping reactive deps
description: App.svelte has 9 effect blocks in same scope. vault.state tracked by both export-debounce and validation effects (overlapping deps). Validation effect cleanup calls validation.destroy() clearing timer — re-run on vault.state change destroys store before new schedule. Fragile to future refactors adding state to destroy().

Annotation context save/clear functions become stale closures on view switch. AnnotationContext registers save/clear fns imperatively from Annotorious viewer overlay. Viewer unmount leaves stale closures over destroyed DOM. Context does not null them. Save annotation from Inspector calls stale fn — throws or silently fails.
resolution: Null out registered functions on viewer unmount. Add guard checking if registering component is mounted. Use ViewBus lifecycle to coordinate.

description: Board feature: 13 @migration stubs, save does nothing. handleBoardSave() logs console.warn and returns — no vault action, no persistence. Export (PNG/SVG/Content State) stubbed. Z-index commented out. Thumbnail returns placeholder. Connection line imports commented out. Arranging items on canvas lost on view close.
resolution: Phase 0 prerequisite: Board persistence (two-tier IIIF + Workspace). Must implement before board is usable.

description: Validation pipeline is inert. scheduleValidation() callback returns empty object on every call. ValidationStore debounces, sets isValidating=true, stores {}, sets isValidating=false. StatusBar displays zero issues. QC Dashboard shows empty state. ArchiveGrid/ArchiveList receive empty validation maps. Architecturally complete but functionally disconnected.
resolution: Wire validateTree(state) into scheduleValidation callback. Requires unifying ValidationIssue types first (see migration domain).

name: Inconsistent null root guards across views
description: 4 of 7 views have {#if root} guards before rendering. The other 3 pass root directly to children and rely on downstream null checks. Inconsistent guarding means some views throw or render broken state when root is briefly null during vault mutations or initial load.
